use_cases: Primary action triggers for forms and interactive elements
Navigation links styled as clickable buttons
Ghost-style buttons for secondary interface actions
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interactions
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with Radix UI Slot composition support and CVA-powered variant system. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Designed as a foundational form control for any React application needing accessible, composable button interactions.
